description: Let each window's local chrome sidebar listen for config-reload/badge events, drive window-move drag (the sidebar's `data-tauri-drag-region` invokes the capability-gated `plugin:window|start_dragging`), and run in-app updates (check/download/install + relaunch). The chrome is each window's local (App-URL) main webview; content tabs load remote (External) URLs, and this capability has no `remote` block (local-only, the default), so Tauri denies these permissions to remote content by origin regardless of label — the sidebar gets them, remote pages never do.
